experiment_designs.research_question: Which planned evidence would support C1 under fair comparison conditions?
experiment_designs.hypothesis: If C1 is credible, the planned evaluation should satisfy the evidence threshold across aligned metrics.
experiment_designs.computational_budget_policy: Use equal function-evaluation or wall-clock reporting policies and disclose any unavoidable difference.
experiment_designs.fairness_requirements: Use the same case instances, termination criteria, parameter reporting rules, and feasibility handling across methods.
experiment_designs.expected_result_pattern: Conditional plan only: the claim would be supported only if aligned metrics meet the predeclared evidence threshold across fair comparisons.
experiment_designs.failure_pattern: The claim should be revised if planned comparisons do not support the threshold or reveal unresolved feasibility, runtime, or baseline risks.
experiment_designs.reviewer_risk: Comparison may be challenged if baselines, metrics, or budgets are misaligned.
limitations: This design does not report empirical outcomes.
